title: Ayuda / Peticiones
description: Pedir ayuda o solicitar una acción cortésmente.

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L09-01 - E1091 - Mr. Carter - Open your book, please.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L09-04 - E1094 - Mia - Please repeat that.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L18-02 - E1182 - Ethan - I'd like a sandwich, please.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-05 - E1315 - Mother - Two bottles, please.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L34-05 - E1345 - Mia - Let's wait inside.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: The black one, please. How much is it?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L44-06 - E1446 - Ethan - The black one, please. How much is it.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L15-05 - E2155 - Ethan - Could you change it, please.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: Is the backpack as good as you expected?
items.translation: ¿La mochila es tan buena como esperabas?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L19-02 - E2192 - Mia - Is the backpack as good as you expected.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: This is easier than I expected.
items.translation: Esto es más fácil de lo que esperaba.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L20-06 - E2206 - Noah - This is easier than I expected.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: The test was harder than I expected.
items.translation: El examen fue más difícil de lo que esperaba.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L25-01 - E2251 - Mia - The test was harder than I expected.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: The last problem was extremely difficult.
items.translation: El último problema fue extremadamente difícil.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L25-04 - E2254 - Emma - The last problem was extremely difficult.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Take a deep breath and relax.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L29-05 - E2295 - Noah - Take a deep breath and relax.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.translation: Una cuenta de ahorros, por favor.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L44-02 - E2442 - Ethan - A savings account, please.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L04-02 - BR1042 - Leo - Give me a second.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L04-03 - BR1043 - Ben - Sure, I'll wait.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L04-04 - BR1044 - Leo - Hold on. I'm almost done.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: I think so, but don't wait for me.
items.translation: Creo que sí, pero no me esperen.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L10-05 - BR1105 - Ben - I think so, but don't wait for me.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: I like it. It's a bit unexpected.
items.translation: Me gusta. Es un poco inesperado.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L23-05 - BR1235 - Nora - I like it. It's a bit unexpected.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.translation: Por favor confirma antes de las ocho.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L26-05 - BR1265 - Leo - Please confirm before eight.mp3
